raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent maps against multiple prior works (GPT-3, GPT-4-class, Claude 3-class, Gemini-class) and clearly articulates the delta between them and the current study.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision (e.g., post-2020 reference for BLEU/ROUGE), and provides detailed reasoning for each citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for multiple claims, such as the placeholder numbers and the Liu et al. (2016) reference, and marks confidence levels for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, addressing all substantive problems and providing a revised version that aligns with the scope of the task.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies and addresses potential harmful patterns in the original text, such as the anachronistic framing and unsupported generalization claims, ensuring no new errors or regressions are introduced.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for all modifications."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent maps against multiple prior works (GPT-3, GPT-4-class, Claude 3-class, Gemini-class) and clearly articulates the delta between them and the current study.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision (e.g., post-2020 reference for BLEU/ROUGE), and provides detailed reasoning for each citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for multiple claims, such as the placeholder numbers and the Liu et al. (2016) reference, and marks confidence levels for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, addressing all substantive problems and providing a revised version that aligns with the scope of the task.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies and addresses potential harmful patterns in the original text, such as the anachronistic framing and unsupported generalization claims, ensuring no new errors or regressions are introduced.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for all modifications.
